---
title: "On Economics Education"
description: "Here’s what four years of economics education has done to my political leanings."
author:
  - name: TJ Palanca
    url: https://www.twitter.com/tjpalanca
date: 10-13-2012
output:
  distill::distill_article:
    self_contained: false
preview: images/20121013-economics-education.png
categories:
  - politics
  - personal
---

Here’s what four years of economics education has done to my political leanings. I figure this isn’t rare. Haha!

```{r out.width="100%"}
knitr::include_graphics("images/20121013-economics-education.png")
```
